waste_categories.name: Organic Waste
waste_categories.description: Biodegradable waste like food scraps, vegetable peels, garden waste

waste_categories.name: Recyclable Waste
waste_categories.description: Paper, plastic bottles, glass, metals that can be recycled

waste_categories.name: Hazardous Waste
waste_categories.description: Chemicals, batteries, paints, and toxic materials

waste_categories.name: E-Waste
waste_categories.description: Electronic waste like phones, laptops, chargers

sorting_guidelines.instructions: Clean and dry plastic before disposal. Remove food residues.
Dispose in compost bin. Avoid mixing with plastics.
Do not throw in regular bins. Use designated collection centers.
Send to authorized e-waste recycling centers.

faqs.question: How do I classify my waste?
faqs.answer: Describe your waste or upload an image, and I will guide you to the correct category.

faqs.question: Where should I dispose of plastic waste?
faqs.answer: Clean plastic should be placed in recyclable waste bins or sent to recycling centers.

faqs.question: What is hazardous waste?
faqs.answer: Hazardous waste includes chemicals, batteries, and toxic materials that need special handling.

faqs.question: Can food waste be recycled?
faqs.answer: Yes, food waste can be composted and used as organic fertilizer.
